# @tyravel/ssr

Client-side hydration runtime for Tyravel SSR islands

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/ssr
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.2` |
| Source | [`packages/ssr`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/ssr) |
| Category | Views & client |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

## Public exports

From the package entry point (`dist/index.d.ts`). Deep imports are not supported.

### Values

- `HYDRATION_SCRIPT_ID`
- `ProgrammaticIslandModule`
- `clearIslands`
- `getIslandMount`
- `hydrate`
- `listRegisteredIslands`
- `readManifestFromDocument`
- `registerIsland`
- `registerProgrammaticIsland`
- `registerProgrammaticIslands`
- `unregisterIsland`

- `HydrateOptions`
- `HydrateResult`

- `HydrationManifestPayload`
- `HydrationRoot`
- `IslandMountContext`
- `IslandMountFn`
